title: Wilder Wildflowers
description: Resource Pack that adds variation to Wildflowers
body:
![A scene of varied Wildflowers in a meadow.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0cb5bff38dc38b0645e69f8b5611ad948b2198d.png)
# Wilder Wildflowers
Wilder Wildflowers is a resource pack that changes Wildflowers to appear with more variants, taking inspiration from real wildflowers.

## Featured Variants
Wilder Wildflowers includes four different types of flowers;
- Yellow (default vanilla MC)
- Lavender [Native to The Mediterranian]
- Stellaria/Chickweed [Native to US/Canada]
- Golden Poppy [Native to Sonoran Desert, US]
---
